case_title: MCGUIRE,EUGENE VS BLAKE,MONICA C/O CITY PROPERTIES

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCGUIRE,EUGENE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLAKE,MONICA C/O CITY PROPERTIES $509.80 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $554.80 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERT. RECEIPT TO EUGENE MCGUIRE RETURNED SIGNED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,189.00 FILED BY MCGUIRE,EUGENE AS TO DEFENDANT BLAKE,MONICA C/O CITY PROPERTIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-19-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BLAKE,MONICA C/O CITY PROPERTIES
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $4,636.00 FILED BY BLAKE,MONICA C/O CITY PROPERTIES AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MCGUIRE,EUGENE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-19-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF MCGUIRE,EUGENE
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BLAKE,MONICA C/O CITY PROPERTIES
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT BLAKE,MONICA C/O CITY PROPERTIES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BLAKE,MONICA C/O CITY PROPERTIES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT MCGUIRE,EUGENE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
